prompt: nul-lifestyle-1x1-05-v1-redo: Square 1:1 editorial group fitness photograph on a clean seamless white cyclorama studio. Three athletes in matching white training apparel side by side performing wall-ball slams in unison — left: a fit man in a white tee and white shorts hoisting a black weighted slam ball overhead, center: a Black woman in a white long-sleeve crop and white briefs with a black slam ball pressed straight up above her head, right: a woman in a black athletic top and white shorts (cropped at the right frame edge) raising a black slam ball overhead. Aggressive slow-shutter motion blur applied ONLY to the lifting arms and slam balls of the outer two athletes — their arms and balls smear into long horizontal ghost-streaks along the lift path with multiple stacked translucent secondary exposures of each ball trailing along the trajectory. The central woman's lifting arms and ball stay sharper and anchored at the focal center. The bodies, faces, and clothing remain tack-sharp. Bright clean studio key light, neutral white-on-white-and-black palette with warm skin midtones. Subtle fine 35mm film grain — understated, not heavy. No logos, no text.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-05-v3-redo: Square 1:1 editorial fitness photograph on a clean seamless white cyclorama studio. Two athletes in white training apparel facing each other a few feet apart, mid medicine-ball pass — a black weighted ball traveling between them through the air, the thrower's arms extended forward in follow-through, the catcher's arms reaching forward to receive. Aggressive slow-shutter motion blur on the moving ball and the thrower's extended arms — the ball smears into a long dramatic horizontal streak across most of the gap between the two athletes, with multiple stacked translucent secondary exposures of the ball spaced along the trajectory like a stop-motion strobe trail. The thrower's forearms also smear in the throw direction. Both athletes' bodies, faces, and clothing remain tack-sharp. Bright clean studio key light, neutral white palette with warm skin tones. Subtle fine 35mm film grain — understated, not heavy. Editorial cinematic. No logos, no text.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-06-v3-redo: Square 1:1 candid documentary gym photograph. Tight close framing on a young athletic woman with long dark hair, mid head-shake — actively whipping her hair sharply to one side after a hard set, sweat drops scattering off the strands. She wears a black athletic top. Background: softly lit blue-grey gym wall. Aggressive slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the swinging hair and trailing droplets — the entire mass of hair smears into long dramatic horizontal ribbon-streaks across most of the frame as it whips, with multiple stacked translucent secondary exposures of the hair along the swing arc, sweat droplets streaking into thin trails. The face, shoulders, and body remain tack-sharp. Cool overcast natural light, understated 35mm Portra 800 grain — present but not heavy. Slightly desaturated palette with warm skin midtones. Documentary editorial style, no text, no logos.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-07-v2-redo: Square 1:1 low-angle action photograph against a clear deep-cyan summer sky. An athletic woman in fitted beige sandstone athletic apparel jumping rope on an outdoor surface, captured mid-jump with both feet just off the ground, knees lifted, the rope swinging around her body in a fast arc. Camera looks up from below at slight angle. Slow-shutter motion blur ONLY on the swinging rope — the rope smears into a long curving arc-streak following its full circular path around her body, with translucent secondary exposures of the rope visible along the arc. Her body, face, ponytail, and the rope handles in her hands remain tack-sharp. Golden-hour warm sun rakes from frame-right across her skin; bright saturated cyan sky behind. Subtle fine 35mm Kodachrome-style grain — understated, not heavy. Warm-vs-cool tonal contrast. Cinematic editorial sport photography, no text, no logos.

nul-lifestyle-1x1-08-v2-redo: Square 1:1 cinematic tennis action photograph at a hardcourt night match. Tight framing on a male tennis player mid-serve-strike — racquet smashing down overhead at the moment of contact with a tossed yellow tennis ball, body extended upward. Wearing a navy-teal performance polo and a bright orange wristband on the racquet arm. The racquet itself is rendered clearly recognizable and crisp at the strike point — the head of the racquet, strings, and frame all readable, hand gripping the handle. Slow-shutter motion blur shows the racquet's path of motion as a translucent ghost trail trailing BEHIND the racquet (not obscuring it) — secondary exposures of the racquet at earlier points along the swing path stack behind it like a stop-motion strobe trail. The striking arm shows similar trailing ghost exposures. The player's body, face, polo, and the rest of his frame remain tack-sharp. Dim moody arena lighting, deep navy court / blue-black background. Subtle fine 35mm cinematic grain — understated, not heavy. Rich saturated shadows. Editorial sports photography, no text, no logos.
